creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #1)
It builds but I have not actually run this version. I prefer to use current non-plexpass versions. I have too much invested in my setup that I usually wait for Plex programmers to fix any bugs that pop up in their code. I will certainly update to this version once it is released as the non-plexpass version.
